action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a bed, a book, a wardrobe, a potion recipe and a pillow. The book is on the bed. The wardrobe is closed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The pillow is on the floor. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a potion recipe. The potion recipe is takeable. There is writing on it. The potion recipe is in. The potion recipe is in the your inventory.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't see any text on the book.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a pillow. The pillow is on the floor. The pillow is takeable. The pillow is on.
action.label: context

action.content:
You read the potion recipe:
Corvidae potion
Ingredients: Water, banana, peach, eye of newt.
1. Pour water into your cauldron.
2. Mix the liquid using a borpulus.
3. Add the eye of newt into your cauldron.
4. Swirl a zulpowand over your cauldron.
5. Put the banana into your cauldron.
6. Put the peach into your cauldron.
action.label: context

action.content: The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a reading room now. There are a shelf, a chair, a table, a side table and a couch. There are passages to a conservatory and a garden here.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a garden now. There are a garden bench, a nightshade, a bucket of water and a lily of the valley. The nightshade is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. The lily of the valley is on the floor. There are passages to a outhouse and a storage room here.
action.label: context

The plinkle crystal is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The whisk is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The spoon is on the floor. There are passages to a hallway and a cellar here.
